tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is offloading work, but I will likely comply to avoid conflict and ensure our project succeeds.

desires: Ensure the group project is submitted perfectly by 19:00 to maintain my reputation as a reliable academic performer.
Avoid any interpersonal friction or confrontation with teammate_A regarding their offloading of work.
Preserve sufficient mental energy for tomorrow's long-term planning and coursework block despite current sleep debt.
Minimize immediate stress accumulation by silently absorbing the extra workload rather than risking relationship strain.

goals.description: Complete teammate_A's portion of the project immediately to ensure the 19:00 submission is flawless.
goals.rationale: My achievement value (0.5) and long planning horizon dictate that the group project's perfect completion is non-negotiable for my academic reputation. The 'soft' difficulty allows me to absorb this extra load without derailing my schedule.

goals.description: Accept the additional workload silently without initiating a confrontation or negotiation with teammate_A.
goals.rationale: My conflict style is strictly avoidant; raising an issue now risks interpersonal friction which I value less than the task outcome. Suppressing the grievance minimizes immediate stress accumulation, aligning with my desire to preserve energy.

goals.description: Execute the work block efficiently to finish by 18:30, preserving the evening for rest to manage current sleep debt.
goals.rationale: While health is a secondary priority (0.13), my high sleep discipline (8) and deliberate time preference require me to protect tomorrow's focus capacity. Finishing early prevents late-night stress spikes.
